Container.Name: statesync
Container.Overview: Lightweight, Alpine-based container providing a real-time playstate sync bridge between your Emby and Jellyfin servers with a Web UI dashboard on port 8754. By default the web UI binds to loopback only; expose it via a reverse proxy or set STATESYNC_BIND + STATESYNC_WEB_AUTH for direct LAN access.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Web interface port for the statesync dashboard. Default binds to host loopback only.

Config.Name: Config Volume
Config.Description: Persistent directory for statesync settings and config file.

Config.Name: Bind Address
Config.Description: Listen address. Set to 0.0.0.0:8754 ONLY if STATESYNC_WEB_AUTH is also set.

Config.Name: Web UI Bearer Token
Config.Description: Required when Bind Address is not loopback. Format: bearer:<token>. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
